question: Will Rivian R2 deliveries begin before June 15, 2026?
textDescription:
Rivian's new midsize SUV, the R2, was announced today. Although the official press release stated "deliveries [were] expected to begin in the first half of 2026," Rivian's previous models were delayed several times.

Will the new R2 be delivered on time? This market will resolve "Yes" if Rivian makes an official announcement via their website (https://rivian.com/newsroom) or X page (https://twitter.com/rivian) that R2's have begun delivery to consumers before June 30, 2026.

https://rivian.com/newsroom/article/rivian-announces-mid-sized-platform

https://techcrunch.com/2021/07/16/rivian-delays-deliveries-of-r1t-r1s-electric-vehicles-again/

https://stories.rivian.com/r1-delivery-window-april-2023#!

Update 2025-11-01 (PST): - Resolution date has been changed to June 30, 2026. (AI summary of creator comment)
newsShortReason: Rivian's R2 Performance deliveries are scheduled to begin in late spring 2026, aligning with the market's June 30, 2026, resolution date.
newsKeyEvidence: Rivian announced R2 Performance deliveries starting in late spring 2026. | First customer deliveries of the R2 are expected to occur this spring. | Rivian's CEO confirmed that the R2 rollout plan remains unchanged despite recent factory damage. | The R2 Performance model is priced at $57,990 and is the first variant to be delivered. | Rivian's CEO stated that the tornado damage to the factory will not affect the R2's rollout plan.
